values: Rule: Initial VCP breakout, MA20 touch-and-hold within 15 sessions, then a close above the highest high from the initial breakout through the pullback bar. Entry is the next session open. Initial stop is the higher of the pattern stop and 8% below fill; otherwise exit after 60 sessions.
Source: rebreak_vcp_2026-07-11_000452.json. Prices include configured entry/exit commission and slippage. Historical result is not evidence of a reliable edge.
